# Cache — offense plan

1. Default with A Main, B Main, two Mid/garage players, and a bomb carrier who can join the better read.
2. Take Mid with a flash or smoke, then use Highway/Connector to split A or Vent to pressure B.
3. A execute: smoke CT/Heaven, molly Forklift or close Quad, flash A Main, and trade through Squeaky.
4. B execute: clear Checkers, smoke Heaven/Rafters, and send the first two players through B Main together.
5. If the defense over-rotates, keep the bomb safe and walk into the weaker site.

## Round rule

Keep the team close enough to trade the first fight. If the first route is denied, preserve the objective and reset.
